DDR5-6400.reason: NEMIX $1,488 Day 30 full-month anchor milestone — longest continuous anchor in tracking history. DDR5 spot $41.833 NEW ALL-TIME HIGH — 3-day ATH digestion resolved upward, Phase 6 new leg confirmed. 7-source 64GB band $2,107-$2,550 maintained. Samsung HBM5E postponed → advanced wafer capacity tilted toward DDR5/HBM4 → no DDR5 supply relief. HBM consuming >20% DRAM output. Dell $60B AI server + $51.3B backlog → demand accelerating. NEW ATH means waiting costs more, not less.

DDR5-5600.reason: ⚡⚡ DDR5 spot $41.833 NEW ALL-TIME HIGH — 3-day ATH digestion resolved UPWARD. DDR5-5600 32GB ¥8,210 (▲+¥33). TrendForce 'buyers on sidelines' narrative invalidated by May 28 actual data — buyers returned after 3-day wait. DDR4/DDR5 first-ever concurrent rally → full DRAM bull market formation, not single-category structural play. NEMIX 96GB $3,200 Day 30 anchor. Micron CEO '2027+'. Citi Q1→Q4 +82%. After new ATH, any short-term pullback is a better entry point within a structural bull market.

PCIe4 TLC.reason: NAND Q1 +85-90% + Q2 +70-75% + 🆕 Q3 2026 full-year sustained. Goldman Sachs NAND 4.2% shortage Day 8. Brand split 2.5-2.7x structural Day 25. Full chain sold out Day 33. 5-year SSD LTA standard. Dell/HP/Lenovo/ASUS warning +15-20% contract → upstream transmitted downstream. DiscTech Day 30 offline does not affect real-time judgment. 6500 ION EOL Day 23. Zero reason to wait.

PCIe5 TLC.reason: SS $17,700 Day 22 (5-week+ milestone). CDW-G $17,274.70 In Stock 4th day persistence — government channel viable. CDW consumer + pack-of-10 backordered + SHI $19,573 Day 5. Samsung PM9D3a 30.72TB undeliverable Day 11. NAND Q3 full-year increases → PCIe5 NAND cost rising all year. Samsung HBM5E postponed + HBM4E shipping → advanced capacity tilting to HBM → PCIe5 SSD packaging squeezed (shared TSP backend). Multi-dimensional supply tightening.

PCIe4 QLC.reason: ⚡ Mouser U.2 Day 10 double-digit milestone — 1 unit, restock Sept 7. E1.L 4 units separate SKU confirmed available. Connection.com $33,048/GovConnection $33,213 4th day persistence — alternative channel reliability proven, not one-off. Procurement has viable high-premium spot path. Newegg $24,600-$27,265 visible but delivery uncertain. Dell $60B AI + NAND Q3 full-year + Goldman Sachs 4.2% shortage → QLC large-capacity indisputable. For Q3/Q4 2026 deployment → immediately lock via Connection/CDW. For Q1 2027 → re-evaluate post Sept 7 Mouser restock but NAND contract will have risen 2 more quarters.
